verifyNote: MUST VERIFY all amounts against the current WIPO PCT Fee Table (updated annually, effective 1 January). USD-denominated ISA fees must also be verified against the USPTO fee schedule.

fees.label: Transmittal Fee (RO/IB)
fees.notes: Some receiving offices charge a transmittal fee. RO/IB: CHF 0.

fees.label: International Filing Fee (up to 30 pages)
fees.notes: Reduced fee (15%) available for e-filing using ePCT

fees.label: Search Fee (EPO as ISA, in CHF equivalent)
fees.notes: Search fee varies by chosen International Searching Authority

fees.label: Search Fee (USPTO as ISA)
fees.notes: Payable in USD directly to the USPTO. MUST VERIFY current USD amount at uspto.gov/learning-and-resources/fees-and-payment/uspto-fee-schedule.

fees.label: Search Fee (India IPO as ISA)
fees.notes: India IPO offers significantly reduced ISA fees — a strategic advantage for India-based filers. Payable in USD. MUST VERIFY current amount.

fees.label: Designation Fee (all PCT contracting states)
fees.notes: MUST VERIFY current designation fee at wipo.int/pct/en/fees/ — a single unified fee covers all PCT contracting states. This is a mandatory fee for every PCT application and must not be omitted when quoting total PCT costs.
